use_case: FB-B-01 — claims rendered from a persisted FHIR Observation can cite either the openemr_record (post-persistence read) OR the originating lab_pdf (pre-persistence). Both source_types satisfy the citation_present rubric. This case mixes both kinds in one set so a regression that breaks heterogeneous source types — e.g. a verifier that only validates lab_pdf — slips loudly.

claims.text: LDL 158 mg/dL persisted as Observation row
Source PDF page 1, derivedFrom DocumentReference linkage preserved
